name: Toppo
desc: Pride Trooper / God of Destruction Candidate

name: Ultra Instinct Explained: Mastery, Sign, and True Ultra Instinct
Top 20 Strongest Dragon Ball Characters of All Time
Kamehameha: History of Goku's Signature Technique
Cell Saga Complete Breakdown: Every Battle & Transformation
All Super Saiyan Forms Ranked: From SSJ1 to Ultra Instinct
desc: Complete power scaling breakdown of every Saiyan transformation across all Dragon Ball series.

name: Goku vs Vegeta: Every Fight Ranked from Worst to Best
desc: Relive every battle between these legendary rivals — the moments that defined Dragon Ball.

name: The Complete Dragon Ball Timeline: Every Arc in Order
desc: From Emperor Pilaf to the Granolah arc — the definitive chronological guide to the entire series.

name: Super Saiyan
desc: 50x base power multiplier. The legendary golden-haired warrior form triggered by rage. First achieved by Goku on Namek after Krillin's death.

name: Super Saiyan 2
desc: 100x base power multiplier with lightning aura. Gohan first achieved this against Cell, unleashing power beyond Super Saiyan limits.

name: Super Saiyan 3
desc: 400x base power multiplier with long golden hair and no eyebrows. Goku first demonstrated this against Majin Buu, consuming massive energy.

name: Super Saiyan God
desc: Divine ki transformation with red hair and slim frame. Achieved through a ritual of five pure-hearted Saiyans, granting god-level power.

name: Super Saiyan Blue
desc: Super Saiyan stacked on Super Saiyan God, featuring blue hair and perfect ki control. The standard god form for Goku and Vegeta in Dragon Ball Super.

name: Ultra Instinct Sign
desc: The incomplete precursor to mastered Ultra Instinct. Body moves autonomously but emotional turbulence prevents full activation. Silver eyes with dark hair.

name: Mastered Ultra Instinct
desc: Complete Ultra Instinct with full silver hair. Every cell in the body reacts independently, achieving perfect autonomous combat at divine speed.

name: Ultra Ego
desc: Vegeta's destroyer-form obtained through Beerus' training. Grows stronger the more damage taken, fueled by battle lust rather than calm.

name: Beast Form
desc: Gohan's ultimate transformation beyond Potential Unleashed. White hair, red eyes, and power rivaling Ultra Instinct. Triggered by rage against Cell Max.

name: Orange Piccolo
desc: Piccolo's awakened form granted by Shenron. Massive size increase, orange skin, and power surpassing Super Saiyan Blue levels.

name: Golden Frieza
desc: Frieza's evolved form achieved through four months of training. Golden sheen and power surpassing Super Saiyan Blue, limited by stamina drain.

name: Black Frieza
desc: Frieza's ultimate form after 10 years in a Hyperbolic Time Chamber. One-shotted Ultra Instinct Goku and Ultra Ego Vegeta simultaneously.

name: Legendary Super Saiyan
desc: Broly's unique berserker form with green-tinted hair and limitless growing power. Bulkier than standard Super Saiyan with uncontrollable rage.

name: Super Saiyan Rage
desc: Trunks' unique hybrid form combining Super Saiyan with divine ki. Blue aura with golden hair, powerful enough to challenge Fused Zamasu.

name: Super Saiyan 4
desc: Primal Saiyan form from Dragon Ball GT combining Super Saiyan with Great Ape control. Red fur, black hair, and direct access to primal Saiyan power.

name: Great Ape
desc: Giant ape transformation triggered by Blutz waves from a full moon. 10x base power multiplier. Saiyans lose control without proper training.

name: Potential Unleashed
desc: Gohan's ultimate state unlocked by Old Kai. All latent potential brought to the surface without needing Super Saiyan transformation.

name: Kaioken
desc: King Kai's technique that multiplies base power up to 20x. Goku stacks this on Super Saiyan Blue for devastating power at the cost of severe body strain.

name: Fusion Dance
desc: Synchronized fusion creating a combined warrior for 30 minutes. Requires matching power levels and precise movements. Produces Gotenks.

name: Potara Fusion
desc: Supreme Kai earring fusion producing a permanent combined warrior. Vegito (Goku + Vegeta) is the strongest Potara fusion in Universe 7.

name: God of Destruction Mode
desc: The power state of a fully realized God of Destruction. Beerus uses this to erase targets from existence with Hakai energy.

name: Super Saiyan Berserk
desc: Kale's unique Legendary Super Saiyan variant from Universe 6. Massive green-haired form with uncontrolled power that rivals Super Saiyan Blue.

name: Full Power Super Saiyan
desc: Goku and Gohan's refined Super Saiyan state after Hyperbolic Time Chamber training. Eliminates the stamina drain and agitation of standard Super Saiyan.

name: Super Saiyan Grade 3
desc: Ultra-bulky Super Saiyan variant used by Trunks against Cell. Massive power increase but speed severely compromised by muscle mass.

name: Wrathful State
desc: Broly's unique form channeling Great Ape power in humanoid size. Yellow eyes and spiked hair. Power can match Super Saiyan God without transforming.

name: Super Saiyan Grade 2
desc: The ascended Super Saiyan form with greatly increased muscle mass, speed, and power. First demonstrated by Vegeta against Semi-Perfect Cell, this form served as a bridge between basic Super Saiyan and the bulkier Grade 3 variant. Features heightened ki output and veined muscles.

name: Super Saiyan Rosé
desc: Goku Black's divine Super Saiyan form with pinkish-rose hair and a dark aura. This unique transformation channels Zamasu's divine ki through Goku's Saiyan body, producing a beautiful yet deadly variant that surpasses standard Super Saiyan Blue.

name: Super Saiyan Blue Evolution
desc: Vegeta's evolved Super Saiyan Blue form featuring deeper blue hair, enlarged muscles, and crystalline blue eyes. Surpasses standard SSB by breaking through his own limits during the Tournament of Power, rivaling Goku's SSB Kaioken x20 without stamina drain.

name: Super Saiyan Blue Kaioken
desc: Goku's daring combination of Super Saiyan Blue with King Kai's Kaioken technique. The red Kaioken aura overlays the blue SSB transformation, multiplying power up to 20x at severe physical cost. First debuted against Hit in the Universe 6 Tournament.

name: False Super Saiyan
desc: A pseudo-Super Saiyan state briefly shown by Goku against Lord Slug in the non-canon movie. Features golden-tinted skin, reddish eyes, and erratic ki fluctuation. Not a true Super Saiyan form but a precursor-like burst of uncontrolled power fueled by rage.

name: Super Saiyan 4 Limit Breaker
desc: The ultimate evolution of Super Saiyan 4 from Super Dragon Ball Heroes. Xeno Goku absorbs universal ki to transcend SSJ4 limits, gaining a crimson-tinged aura, darker fur, and hair. Power rivals and exceeds Super Saiyan Blue in crossover battles against god-level opponents.

name: Perfect Cell
desc: Cell's ultimate bio-android form achieved by absorbing Androids 17 and 18. Features a sleek exoskeleton, tail retraction, and perfect combat efficiency combining Saiyan, Namekian, and Frieza race DNA. Equal to a Full Power Super Saiyan in physical capability with regeneration and infinite energy.

name: Fifth Form Cooler
desc: Frieza's older brother Cooler's unique fifth transformation beyond the standard fourth form. Features a bio-armored mask, spiked carapace, and massive size increase. Cooler claims this form gives him power Frieza never achieved, pushing his race's evolution further.

name: Super Janemba
desc: Janemba's final form after absorbing Hell's evil energy. A demonic swordsman with reality-warping abilities that transmute matter and teleport across dimensions. Defeated by Super Gogeta's Stardust Breaker which purified his evil essence at the molecular level.

name: Giant Form
desc: A massive size transformation used by Namekians (Piccolo, Lord Slug) and other beings. Dr. Wheelo and Lord Slug both employed giant forms to overwhelm opponents. Piccolo's version, enhanced by Shenron's potential unlock, reached Orange Piccolo giant size capable of grappling Cell Max.

name: Kamehameha
desc: Goku's signature energy wave created by Master Roshi. Concentrated ki blast fired from cupped hands, with power scaling to the user's level.

name: Final Flash
desc: Vegeta's ultimate energy attack. Charges ki into one hand then releases a massive yellow beam. Used to nearly destroy Perfect Cell.

name: Destructo Disc
desc: Krillin's razor-sharp spinning ki disc that can cut through nearly anything. A lethal attack capable of bisecting enemies far stronger than the user.

name: Spirit Bomb
desc: Goku's ultimate technique gathering energy from all living things. A massive sphere of pure life energy that grows more powerful with willing donations.

name: Instant Transmission
desc: Goku's teleportation technique learned from the Yardrats. Locks onto a ki signature and instantly transports anywhere in the universe.

name: Solar Flare
desc: A blinding flash of light that temporarily disables opponents' vision. Used by Tien, Krillin, and Goku as an escape or setup technique.

name: Tri-Beam
desc: Tien's life-force-powered energy attack. Each use shortens the user's lifespan but produces a devastating rectangular blast capable of stalling Cell.

name: Special Beam Cannon
desc: Piccolo's piercing drill-like energy beam with a spiral trajectory. Requires long charge time but penetrates nearly any defense.

name: Masenko
desc: Gohan's signature energy blast taught by Piccolo. Two-handed overhead ki wave faster to charge than Kamehameha but with comparable power.

name: Galick Gun
desc: Vegeta's trademark purple energy wave fired from a unique hand pose. The attack that clashed with Goku's Kaioken Kamehameha during the Saiyan Saga.

name: Big Bang Attack
desc: Vegeta's point-blank energy sphere attack fired with an open palm. A concentrated explosion designed to obliterate a single target instantly.

name: Death Beam
desc: Frieza's finger-laser attack that fires thin piercing beams at near-instant speed. Killed Vegeta on Namek with a single shot through the heart.

name: Death Ball
desc: Frieza's planet-destroying sphere attack. A massive condensed ball of ki that can be detonated remotely to destroy entire celestial bodies.

name: Kienzan
desc: The Japanese name for Destructo Disc. A razor-thin ki disc that spins at high speed to cut through targets regardless of power difference.

name: Wolf Fang Fist
desc: Yamcha's signature martial arts technique combining rapid claw strikes with wolf-like ferocity. A close-combat barrage used throughout the original Dragon Ball.

name: Evil Containment Wave
desc: Master Roshi's sealing technique that traps an opponent in a container. Costs the user their life if not executed perfectly. Used against Demon King Piccolo and Zamasu.

name: Fusion Dance
desc: The Metamoran technique fusing two warriors into one for 30 minutes. Requires perfect synchronization of power levels and movements.

name: Potara Fusion
desc: Permanent fusion using Supreme Kai earrings. Produces a warrior far stronger than the sum of its parts, with the dominant personality prevailing.

name: Hakai
desc: The God of Destruction technique that erases targets from existence entirely. Beerus and other destroyers use this power to maintain universal balance.

name: Stardust Breaker
desc: Gogeta's rainbow-colored energy attack that disintegrates targets at the molecular level. Used to destroy Janemba in Fusion Reborn and Broly in DBS: Broly.

name: Hellzone Grenade
desc: Piccolo's tactical attack scattering multiple ki orbs around an opponent that converge simultaneously from all directions, leaving no escape.

name: Final Kamehameha
desc: Vegito's combined attack merging Final Flash and Kamehameha into a single devastating blue-gold energy wave of unparalleled destructive power.

name: Dragon Fist
desc: Goku's ultimate punching technique manifesting a golden dragon that pierces through the opponent. Defeated Super 17 and Eis Shenron with this legendary strike.

name: Multi-Form Technique
desc: Tien's technique splitting the user into multiple copies at reduced power. Used strategically for simultaneous attacks or to escape dangerous situations.

name: Meteor Combination
desc: Goku's close-combat rush attack combining rapid punches, kicks, and a final Kamehameha. Used to finish Kid Buu in the final battle of DBZ.

name: Kaio-ken
desc: King Kai's signature technique that multiplies the user's power, speed, and senses by a chosen factor. Goku mastered this up to x20 against Frieza and later stacked it on Super Saiyan Blue, though improper control causes severe body damage and ki exhaustion.

name: Light Grenade
desc: Piccolo's concentrated energy sphere attack formed by gathering ki into a single palm. A dense, explosive orb that detonates on impact with massive concussive force. Used against Imperfect Cell and Android 17 with devastating area-of-effect damage.

name: Burning Attack
desc: Future Trunks' signature energy attack fired from a unique arm-crossed hand gesture. A fiery orange blast of concentrated ki that creates a massive explosion upon impact. First demonstrated when Trunks destroyed Frieza's ship and soldiers upon his arrival.

name: Heat Dome Attack
desc: Trunks' ultimate technique where he raises his sword skyward, charges it with blazing ki, and swings down to unleash a dome-shaped energy wave. Used to deliver the final blow to Fused Zamasu's physical body alongside the Spirit Bomb Sword.

name: Finish Buster
desc: Trunks' one-handed energy blast fired with a forward palm thrust. A rapid-deployment ki wave designed for mid-range combat that can be charged quickly. Used frequently throughout the Android and Cell sagas as Trunks' go-to ranged assault.

name: Big Bang Kamehameha
desc: Gogeta's fusion technique combining Vegeta's Big Bang Attack with Goku's Kamehameha. A colossal blue sphere fired from a unique hand pose that unleashes Big Bang-level destruction with Kamehameha-range. Used against Omega Shenron and Super Saiyan Broly.

name: Father-Son Kamehameha
desc: The legendary Kamehameha powered by Goku's spirit energy from the Other World, channeled through Gohan during the Cell Games. Combined the power of father and son in one decisive wave, destroying Super Perfect Cell in the most emotional finish of the series.

name: Gamma Burst Flash
desc: Vegeta's advanced energy attack introduced in Dragon Ball Super. A rapid-fire burst of golden-green ki blasts unleashed from both hands simultaneously, saturating the battlefield with destructive energy. Developed during training with Whis on Beerus' planet.

name: Prominence Flash
desc: Vegeta's solar-flare variant that combines blinding light with explosive force. Unlike a standard Solar Flare, this technique both blinds opponents and delivers concussive damage. Used to create openings against multiple opponents simultaneously.

name: Gigantic Roar
desc: Broly's devastating mouth-fired energy blast that unleashes a massive green ki wave. Originating from his uncontrollable rage, this attack can level entire landscapes. The sheer power output exceeds most standard energy techniques due to Broly's limitless ki growth.

name: Omega Blaster
desc: Broly's ultimate energy sphere technique. A compressed green ki ball fired from an outstretched palm that detonates with planet-shattering force. The longer Broly charges it, the larger and more devastating the explosion becomes.

name: Divine Lasso
desc: Fused Zamasu's signature technique creating blades of crimson energy that pierce targets and detonate on command. These energy spikes pin opponents in place before releasing a devastating internal explosion of divine ki.

name: Sphere of Destruction
desc: Beerus' Hakai concentrated into a compact purple sphere of destruction energy. Anything touched by this sphere is erased from existence entirely, bypassing all conventional durability. Beerus can adjust its size from a marble to a planet-annihilating orb.

name: Dodon Ray
desc: The Crane School's signature assassination technique created by Master Shen. A thin, high-speed beam fired from one finger that trades explosive power for precision and lethality. Tien and Chiaotzu both mastered this before leaving the Crane School.

name: Darkness Eye Beam
desc: Piccolo Daimao and Piccolo Jr.'s optic energy attack firing twin beams from their eyes. A rapid, precise technique capable of piercing through defenses at close range. Used throughout the original Dragon Ball and early DBZ as Piccolo's quick-draw weapon.

name: Neo Tri-Beam
desc: Tien's enhanced Tri-Beam variant that fires a sustained rectangular blast instead of a single pulse. Can be chained continuously at the cost of massive life force drain. Tien used this to stall Semi-Perfect Cell for minutes despite the enormous power gap.

name: Spirit Sword
desc: Vegeta's energy blade technique condensing ki into a razor-sharp sword extending from his hand. The length and power are fully adjustable, allowing both precision strikes and sweeping slashes. Used to cut through opponents resistant to standard ki blasts.

name: Body Change
desc: Captain Ginyu's signature technique that swaps his body with the target's. A purple energy wave fires from his mouth to initiate the transfer. Ginyu's most dangerous ability, nearly trapping Goku in a broken body during the Frieza Saga.

name: Time Skip
desc: Hit's legendary assassination technique that skips time forward by a fraction of a second. During the skip, Hit can reposition and strike freely while opponents experience a temporal gap. Can be extended to longer durations and even create a pocket dimension of stored time.

name: Super Ghost Kamikaze Attack
desc: Gotenks' creative technique materializing ghost-like ki constructs that detonate on contact with opponents. Each ghost is semi-sentient, can taunt enemies, and generates a massive explosion. Up to ten ghosts can be deployed simultaneously for overwhelming coverage.

name: Galactic Donut
desc: Gotenks' constricting ki ring technique that forms glowing golden rings to bind opponents. Once trapped, targets are completely immobilized and vulnerable to follow-up attacks. Used against Super Buu to restrict his movements during their battle.

name: Healing
desc: Ki-based regeneration used by Namekians (Dende) and Supreme Kai apprentices. Transfers the healer's energy to restore wounds and stamina in others. Dende's version can heal near-fatal injuries in seconds, making him invaluable support for the Z-Fighters.

name: Magic Materialization
desc: The Namekian ability to conjure physical objects from nothing using magical energy. Piccolo famously created Gohan's gi, sword, and even a fully-formed hourglass. Notable for creating the Clothes Beam that produces perfectly tailored battle outfits on demand.

name: Absorption
desc: Used by Cell (tail absorption), Majin Buu (body absorption), and Androids 19/20 (palm absorption). Cell absorbs life energy and entire beings. Buu absorbs warriors to gain their power and appearance. Energy-draining variants steal ki through physical contact.

name: Regeneration
desc: The ability to recover from any physical damage instantly, used by Namekians (Piccolo), Majin Buu, and Cell. Piccolo can regrow limbs at high ki cost. Buu's version is nearly limitless — reforming from single cells or even vapor. Cell requires his core nucleus to be intact.

name: Chocolate Beam
desc: Majin Buu's transmutation technique fired from his head tendril. Transform any target into chocolate, candy, or clay. The transformed victims retain some consciousness as food. One of the most terrifying hax abilities that bypasses all conventional power scaling.

name: Crusher Ball
desc: Jeice's signature technique from the Ginyu Force. A compact crimson energy sphere thrown like a baseball pitch with devastating explosive power. Can be guided mid-flight and detonated remotely, making it effective for both direct hits and tactical ambushes.

name: Tournament Saga
desc: The first Dragon Ball saga. Young Goku meets Bulma, Yamcha, and Master Roshi. Introduces the Tenkaichi Budokai tournament format and the legendary Muten Roshi training.

name: Red Ribbon Army Saga
desc: Goku battles the Red Ribbon Army across the world to retrieve the Dragon Balls. Introduces Korin Tower, the Sacred Water, and Android 8.

name: Demon King Piccolo Saga
desc: King Piccolo is released and conquers Earth. Goku drinks the Ultra Divine Water and defeats him with an Oozaru punch through the chest. Krillin's first death.

name: 23rd World Tournament Saga
desc: Goku vs Piccolo Jr. in the tournament finals. Goku reveals flight and wins the tournament before marrying Chi-Chi. End of original Dragon Ball.

name: Saiyan Saga
desc: Raditz arrives on Earth revealing Goku's Saiyan heritage. Goku sacrifices himself, trains with King Kai, and returns to defeat Nappa and Vegeta in an epic beam clash.

name: Frieza Saga
desc: Goku and the Z-Fighters travel to Namek. Goku awakens Super Saiyan after Krillin's death and defeats Frieza in the series' most iconic and longest battle.

name: Cell Saga
desc: Dr. Gero's ultimate android absorbs Androids 17 and 18 to achieve perfection. Gohan's SSJ2 Father-Son Kamehameha defeats Cell and saves Earth.

name: Buu Saga
desc: Majin Buu is unleashed on Earth. From Fat Buu to Kid Buu, the Z-Fighters face an immortal regenerating threat that requires the Spirit Bomb to finally destroy.

name: Other World Saga
desc: Goku competes in the Other World Tournament after his death. Faces Pikkon in the finals and learns Super Saiyan 2 and 3 during his time in the afterlife.

name: Battle of Gods Saga
desc: Beerus awakens seeking the Super Saiyan God. Goku achieves SSJ God through a ritual and earns Beerus' respect in an Earth-shattering battle above the clouds.

name: Resurrection F Saga
desc: Frieza is resurrected and achieves Golden Frieza. Vegeta and Goku unveil Super Saiyan Blue and Whis rewinds time to let Goku finish the battle.

name: Universe 6 Saga
desc: A tournament between Universe 7 and 6 introduces Hit, Cabba, Frost, and the Super Dragon Balls. Goku debuts SSJ Blue Kaioken against Hit's Time-Skip.

name: Future Trunks Saga
desc: Zamasu steals Goku's body and destroys the future. Vegito Blue faces Fused Zamasu before Future Zeno erases the entire corrupted timeline with absolute power.

name: Tournament of Power Saga
desc: 8 universes fight for survival in Zeno's tournament. Goku awakens Ultra Instinct, Frieza and Goku team up against Jiren, and Android 17 wins MVP.

name: Moro Saga
desc: The planet-eating sorcerer Moro escapes Galactic Prison. Goku masters Ultra Instinct Sign while Merus sacrifices himself to teach the final lesson.

name: Granolah Saga
desc: The Cerealian sniper Granolah wishes to become the strongest. Bardock's past is revealed, Black Frieza debuts, and Goku discovers True Ultra Instinct.

name: Baby Saga
desc: The Tuffle parasite Baby infests Earth and Vegeta's body. Goku achieves Super Saiyan 4 and defeats Baby Vegeta to restore Earth from Tuffle domination.

name: Super 17 Saga
desc: Android 17 from Hell merges with Earth's 17 to form Super 17. Goku's Dragon Fist pierces through the ultimate machine mutant to save the day.

name: Shadow Dragon Saga
desc: Overuse of Dragon Balls creates seven evil dragons. Goku faces each shadow dragon, culminating in Omega Shenron defeated by the Universal Spirit Bomb.

name: Super Hero Saga
desc: The Red Ribbon Army returns with Gamma 1 and 2. Gohan awakens Beast Form and Piccolo achieves Orange form to defeat the resurrected Cell Max.

name: Fortuneteller Baba Saga
desc: Goku and friends compete in Baba's tournament to learn the last Dragon Ball's location. Features Goku's emotional reunion with Grandpa Gohan for one night. Introduces Devilman, Spike the Devil Man, and Baba's five supernatural fighters. Episodes 68-78 of original Dragon Ball.

name: Tien Shinhan Saga
desc: The 22nd Tenkaichi Budokai introduces Tien Shinhan and Chiaotzu as Crane School rivals. Master Roshi competes as Jackie Chun while Tien's brutal fighting style shocks the audience. Krillin's first death at the hands of Tambourine kicks off the King Piccolo conflict. Episodes 82-101 of Dragon Ball.

name: Garlic Jr. Saga
desc: A DBZ filler saga set after Frieza's defeat. Garlic Jr. escapes the Dead Zone using the Makyo Star's power and infects Earth's population with the Black Water Mist. Gohan, Krillin, and Piccolo must stop him without Goku's help. Introduces the concept of the Lookout's guardian legacy. Episodes 195-199 of Dragon Ball Z.

name: Trunks Saga
desc: A mysterious youth arrives and defeats Mecha Frieza with a single sword strike. Trunks reveals the impending Android threat and Goku's fatal heart virus, setting the Z-Fighters on a three-year training race against time. The saga that bridges Frieza's return and the Android apocalypse.

name: Androids Saga
desc: Androids 19 and 20 (Dr. Gero) attack, forcing the Z-Fighters to defend Earth. Vegeta reveals Super Saiyan to destroy Android 19. Androids 16, 17, and 18 awaken, defeating the Z-Fighters effortlessly. Cell emerges from the future, beginning his hunt to absorb the androids.

name: Fusion Saga
desc: Super Buu emerges after absorbing Gotenks and Piccolo, eventually absorbing Ultimate Gohan to become Buuhan. Goku and Vegeta fuse into Vegito to counter Buu's overwhelming power. The saga showcases every fusion method and Buu's most dangerous forms.

name: Kid Buu Saga
desc: The final DBZ saga. Kid Buu destroys Earth, forcing Goku and Vegeta to fight on the Sacred World of the Kais. Vegeta's speech acknowledging Goku as the best, Mr. Satan's crucial role, and the massive Spirit Bomb powered by Earth's entire population bring DBZ to its climactic finale.

name: Broly Saga
desc: The canon reintroduction of Broly in Dragon Ball Super. Paragus brings Broly to Earth seeking revenge on Vegeta's family. Broly's rage-fueled power growth forces Goku and Vegeta to fuse into Gogeta. A visual spectacle of escalating Saiyan combat with Cheelai and Lemo providing Broly's redemption arc. DBS: Broly movie (2018).

name: Black Star Dragon Ball Saga
desc: The opening saga of Dragon Ball GT. Pilaf accidentally turns Goku back into a child using the Black Star Dragon Balls. Goku, Trunks, and Pan embark on a universal quest to recover the balls before Earth explodes from the Black Star energy buildup. Introduces the Grand Tour format and GT's unique premise.

name: Daima Saga
desc: A conspiracy turns Goku and all his friends into children through the Demon Realm Dragon Balls. Goku ventures into the Demon Realm with Supreme Kai (Shin), Glorio, and Panzy to confront King Gomah. Features new lore about Namekian origins, Majin Buu's creation, and Super Saiyan 3 Vegeta.

name: Saiyan Race
desc: A warrior race from Planet Vegeta known for Zenkai boosts, Great Ape transformation, and Super Saiyan forms. Nearly extinct after Frieza destroyed their planet. Represented by Goku, Vegeta, Broly, Gohan, and Trunks. Saiyans grow stronger after near-death and thrive on battle.

name: Namekian Race
desc: A peaceful slug-like species from Planet Namek capable of regeneration, limb stretching, and ki-based magic. Notable for creating Dragon Balls and possessing fusion abilities. Represented by Piccolo, Dende, Nail, and Kami. They sustain themselves on water alone and reproduce asexually through eggs.

name: Frieza Race
desc: A mysterious mutated species producing some of the universe's strongest warriors, also called Frost Demons. Notable for multiple transformative forms that suppress true power. Represented by Frieza, King Cold, and Cooler. Their natural durability allows survival in the vacuum of space.

name: Majin Race
desc: Primordial beings of pure evil created by the wizard Bibidi. Possess infinite regeneration, absorption abilities, and transmutation magic. Represented by Kid Buu, Fat Buu, Super Buu, and Uub (reincarnation). Their power scales based on whom or what they absorb into their malleable bodies.

name: Androids / Cyborgs
desc: Artificially enhanced beings created by Dr. Gero and the Red Ribbon Army. Range from fully mechanical (Android 16) to human-based cyborgs (17, 18) to bio-androids (Cell). Infinite energy reactors grant unlimited stamina. Gamma 1 and 2 represent the latest generation of Red Ribbon technology.

name: Kai (Shinjin)
desc: Divine beings born from the Kaiju fruit on the World Core planet. Supreme Kais watch over creation while King Kais govern quadrants of the universe. Represented by Shin, King Kai, Elder Kai, and Zamasu. Golden fruit produces Supreme Kai candidates; regular fruit produces standard Kais. Life-linked to Gods of Destruction.

name: Angel Race
desc: The highest-ranking divine beings serving as attendants to Gods of Destruction. Possess perfect Ultra Instinct and power far exceeding their destroyer masters. Represented by Whis, Vados, Maracrita, and the Grand Minister. Bound by angelic law to remain neutral and never engage in combat directly.

name: God of Destruction
desc: Deities appointed to destroy planets, civilizations, and threats to maintain universal balance. Each universe has one GoD served by an angel attendant. Represented by Beerus (Universe 7), Champa (Universe 6), Belmod (Universe 11). Their power is bound to the life of their universe's Supreme Kai.

name: Z-Fighters
desc: Earth's premier defense team originally formed to combat the Saiyan threat. Core members include Goku, Vegeta, Piccolo, Gohan, Krillin, Tien, and Android 18. This loose alliance of former enemies and rivals has defended Earth against Frieza, Cell, Buu, and universe-ending threats for decades.

name: Red Ribbon Army
desc: A global paramilitary organization led by Commander Red seeking the Dragon Balls for world domination. Dr. Gero's android program produced the most dangerous creations from this army. Revived in Dragon Ball Super: Super Hero under Magenta's leadership, creating Gamma 1, Gamma 2, and Cell Max.

name: Frieza Force
desc: An intergalactic military empire founded by King Cold and expanded by Frieza. Controls over 448 planets through conquest and planet-brokering. The Ginyu Force, Zarbon, Dodoria, and the Saiyan Army were its most notorious units. Resurrected after the Tournament of Power with Frieza returning to command.

name: Ginyu Force
desc: Frieza's elite five-man squadron of flamboyant super-warriors. Captain Ginyu's Body Change, Jeice's Crusher Ball, Burter's speed, Recoome's brute force, and Guldo's time-freezing telekinesis made them the most feared strike team in the Frieza Force until Goku dismantled them on Namek.

name: Pride Troopers
desc: Universe 11's heroic justice organization protecting their universe's planets. Jiren, Toppo (a God of Destruction candidate), and Dyspo are their strongest members. Operate under a strict code of justice and honor, contrasting with Universe 7's informal Z-Fighter approach to planetary defense.

name: Galactic Patrol
desc: An interstellar law enforcement agency policing the Milky Way galaxy. Jaco is their Earth liaison, while Merus was secretly an angel-in-training. Imprisoned Moro for millions of years before his escape. Recruited Goku and Vegeta as temporary deputized officers to combat the Moro threat.

name: Heeter Force
desc: A family-based criminal syndicate operating as information brokers and power dealers throughout Universe 7. Gas, the strongest Heeter, made a wish to become the universe's top warrior using the Cerealian Dragon Balls. Led by Elec, who manipulated events to eliminate Frieza's empire and seize control.

name: Time Patrol
desc: An organization from the future tasked with preserving the integrity of the timeline. Xeno Trunks and Chronoa (Supreme Kai of Time) lead agents who correct temporal anomalies and prevent history-altering threats. Featured prominently in Dragon Ball Xenoverse and Super Dragon Ball Heroes.
